assertions.description: navigator.gpu is exposed as the WebGPU entry point.
navigator.gpu.requestAdapter is callable before inspecting optional compressed texture features.
GPUAdapter.features exposes a has() method for optional texture-compression feature detection.
If the adapter advertises texture-compression-bc-sliced-3d, a requested device includes the feature.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const feature='texture-compression-bc-sliced-3d';if(!a.features.has(feature))return true;const required=['texture-compression-bc',feature].filter(f=>a.features.has(f));const d=await a.requestDevice({requiredFeatures:required});const ok=d.features.has(feature);d.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: If the adapter advertises texture-compression-astc-sliced-3d, a requested device includes the feature.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const feature='texture-compression-astc-sliced-3d';if(!a.features.has(feature))return true;const required=['texture-compression-astc',feature].filter(f=>a.features.has(f));const d=await a.requestDevice({requiredFeatures:required});const ok=d.features.has(feature);d.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: When BC sliced 3D compression is enabled, a small 3D BC texture descriptor validates.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const feature='texture-compression-bc-sliced-3d';if(!a.features.has(feature))return true;const required=['texture-compression-bc',feature].filter(f=>a.features.has(f));const d=await a.requestDevice({requiredFeatures:required});const t=d.createTexture({size:{width:4,height:4,depthOrArrayLayers:4},dimension:'3d',format:'bc1-rgba-unorm',usage:GPUTextureUsage.TEXTURE_BINDING});t.destroy();d.destroy();return true;})()

assertions.description: When ASTC sliced 3D compression is enabled, a small 3D ASTC texture descriptor validates.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const feature='texture-compression-astc-sliced-3d';if(!a.features.has(feature))return true;const required=['texture-compression-astc',feature].filter(f=>a.features.has(f));const d=await a.requestDevice({requiredFeatures:required});const t=d.createTexture({size:{width:4,height:4,depthOrArrayLayers:4},dimension:'3d',format:'astc-4x4-unorm',usage:GPUTextureUsage.TEXTURE_BINDING});t.destroy();d.destroy();return true;})()
